headline: Cisco Systems Capitalizes on AI Networking Boom: More Upside Ahead?
summary: CSCO rides on AI networking demand as Q3 revenues rise 125 to $15.8B, with networking up 25% and orders surging across segments.

headline: Chip stocks jump as Strait of Hormuz reopens
summary: Memory and storage chip companies surged on Monday, June 15, after the United States and Iran announced a peace agreement that will reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The rally didn't come about because the AI trade suddenly changed; it came about because the single biggest threat to it just got removed. ...

headline: BofA Securities Raises Price Target for Arista Networks (ANET)
summary: Arista Networks Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the 10 best computer hardware stocks to buy for the next 5 years.
